Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Kyri Prest]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 1''' — Kyri Prest is a Visiri and has held the title of Archmage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 1''' — Kyri Prest is the narrator's teacher.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 1''' — Kyri Prest has a third eye that shines white.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 1''' — Kyri Prest has an Aethertech prosthetic arm replacing one lost in an Iron Legion ambush.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 1''' — Kyri Prest is a skilled Combat Artist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 1''' — Kyri Prest is an Archmage who earned her title on the battlefield.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 1''' — Kyri Prest is a Lieutenant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 1''' — Kyri Prest uses a wand that is a jagged spike of silver metal resembling a steel icicle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 1''' — Kyri Prest uses high-grade, silver and sleek prosthetic arms that run with blue lights.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 9''' — Kyri has a prosthetic arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 9''' — Kyri is a famous duelist and wizard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 9''' — Kyri has three eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 9''' — Kyri has red skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — Kyri Prest is the combat trainer for the Knights.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — Kyri is a coach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — Kyri's aura is a pale pink close to white.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — Kyri is an arena duelist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 31''' — Kyri was a teacher in the Titan Force.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 7''' — Kyri was the narrator's mentor in water magic.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
